predictions.statement: VE-001 reaches a conclusive verdict (pass or fail, not inconclusive) on its pre-committed thresholds by 2026-08-31
predictions.resolution_note: RC-8: waitlist conversions typically 5-15%; our 40/15 thresholds leave a wide inconclusive zone

predictions.statement: VE-001 passes: >=40% of qualified merchants complete the waitlist including the >=30% routing condition
predictions.resolution_note: RC-2 (10-30% sustain new rails) and RC-8 both argue the routing ask is hard; 0.25 reflects deliberate above-class threshold

predictions.statement: VE-002 finds >=20% of mapped supplier relationships card-payable without surcharge
predictions.resolution_note: RC-7 range 10-35%; UAE wholesale skews transfer-on-terms, so below class midpoint

predictions.statement: Desk research confirms AstraTech can price SME revolving credit at >=18% APR-equivalent without being uncompetitive
predictions.resolution_note: RC-4 says merchants accept 25-50% APR-equiv for revenue-linked products; risk is bank competition for the best credits

predictions.statement: Workstream A commits at least 10 evidence records to knowledge-base/customer-evidence/records/ by 2026-07-31
predictions.resolution_note: Their module and templates shipped 2026-07-10; execution cadence unknown
